data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an audit trail that includes both IP address and timestamp, as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence of such an audit trail, nor any API responses or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail with IP address and timestamp.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for audit trail implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the audit trail captures IP address and timestamp for each action.
